title: ruta graveolens var. angustifolia
intro: Ruta graveolens var. angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved rue or prickly rue, is a plant species that belongs to the rutaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of ruta graveolens var. angustifolia include reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Ruta graveolens var. angustifolia can be prepared as an herbal infusion, tincture, or oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and soothe the body.
